analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of docs.cryptoprocessing.com covered 50 pages at 102% crawl completion with 91.5% overall confidence. Site contains 26 API pages with 64% reference coverage, indicating gaps in API documentation completeness. Critical quality issues include 34% SEO/geo problem rate and 0% example reliability estimate. One confirmed broken internal link detected within user-facing documentation.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage at 102%, capturing all discoverable documentation pages
High overall audit confidence at 91.5% with strong link verification (95% confidence)
100% last-updated metadata coverage, enabling freshness tracking
26 API pages successfully detected with 85% detection confidence
Zero repository navigation broken links, keeping user-facing docs clean
risks: 34% SEO/geo issue rate threatens discoverability and search ranking performance
0% example reliability estimate indicates code samples may be outdated, untested, or non-functional
64% API reference coverage leaves 36% of API surface undocumented or poorly covered
One confirmed broken internal link degrades user navigation experience
Small documentation footprint (50 pages) may indicate incomplete product coverage
No example testing infrastructure apparent, risking customer implementation failures
Low example reliability combined with payment processing domain creates high customer risk

prioritized_actions.action: Implement automated example testing pipeline to validate all code samples in payment processing workflows
Complete API reference documentation for the missing 36% of API surface area
Audit and fix SEO/geo issues affecting 34% of pages to improve discoverability
Repair confirmed broken internal link and establish link monitoring
Conduct content gap analysis to determine if 50-page footprint adequately covers crypto payment processing features

limitations: External audit cannot verify functional correctness of API endpoints or accuracy of technical specifications
Example reliability estimate reflects static analysis only; actual code execution, dependency compatibility, and runtime behavior not tested
SEO/geo issue detection limited to structural problems; cannot assess content quality, accuracy, or competitive search performance
Crawl restricted to publicly accessible pages; authenticated documentation, private integrations, or partner-only content not evaluated
API coverage percentage measures documentation presence, not completeness of parameter descriptions, error scenarios, or real-world usage guidance
